title: Typed AppState replacing addon.data
goal: Replace untyped addon.data with typed AppState interface and scoped accessor functions. Entry-point files (index.ts, app/addon.ts) may access addon.data directly; all others use accessors.
in_scope: Define AppState interface with sub-interfaces in src/app/state.ts (final M009 location)
Update all consuming files to use typed accessors
acceptance: Grep addon.data. in src/ returns matches ONLY in app/state.ts and index.ts
